name: wxcode-admin-aegis-insurance
title: Aegis Insurance Admin
description: Institutional light-mode operations dashboard for an insurance carrier — policy & claims lifecycle management. Left sidebar with line-of-business switcher, topbar with period filter, 4 KPI cards, claims pipeline board, policies table, renewals panel, and inline SVG claims trend chart.

query.en: Build me an insurance carrier admin dashboard — line-of-business sidebar, KPI cards for active policies, open claims, renewals due and loss ratio, a claims pipeline board, policies table, renewals panel, and a claims trend chart.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me an insurance carrier admin dashboard — line-of-business sidebar, KPI cards for active policies, open claims, renewals due and loss ratio, a claims pipeline board, policies table, renewals panel, and a claims trend chart.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
